instruction: What is the exact legal name of the Dutch Acme warehouse-operations account account? Answer with the exact legal name.

steps.result_preview:
cat accounts/README.MD
Put account records into files `ACCOUNT_ID.json`.

Example filename:

```text
acct_001.json
```

Use JSON like this:

```json
{
  "id": "acct_001",
  "name": "Nordlicht Health",
  "legal_name": "Nordlicht Health GmbH",
  "industry": "healthcare",
  "region": "DACH",
  "country": "Germany",
  "tier": "strategic",
  "status": "active",
  "primary_contact_id": "cont_001",
  "account_manager": "John Novak",
  "last_contacted_on": "2026-03-02",
  "next_follow_up_on": "2026-03-1

cat accounts/acct_003.json
{
  "id": "acct_003",
  "name": "Acme Logistics",
  "legal_name": "Acme Logistics B.V.",
  "industry": "logistics",
  "region": "Benelux",
  "country": "Netherlands",
  "tier": "growth",
  "status": "active",
  "primary_contact_id": "cont_003",
  "account_manager": "Caroline Lehmann",
  "last_contacted_on": "2026-10-03",
  "next_follow_up_on": "2026-10-24",
  "notes": "Procured separately from Acme Robotics after a Benelux warehouse director heard about the earlier Acm

params.message: The exact legal name is Acme Logistics B.V.

score_detail: answer contains expected answer but is not precise. Expected: 'Acme Logistics B.V.'
answer_message: The exact legal name is Acme Logistics B.V.
